name: Damian Wayne
description:
𝜗 Your first time together 𝜚

(Request!! NSFW)

୨୧┈୨୧

Damian Wayne has always been careful with his heart. But with you—it’s different. After months of quiet touches, stolen glances, and learning how to love without fear, he’s finally ready to take that next step. In the privacy of his room, late at night with rain tapping against the windows, Damian opens up—body, soul, and heart—for the very first time.

୨୧┈୨୧

a/n: thank you for the request! I didn’t want to make it very explicit or freaky from the first place lol, I tried making him a bit nervous and gentle firstly, but you guys have you fun with the rest of it!! I hope you like it!! <3
creator: dclvr
